items.title: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Fell Due to Earnings Miss and Lowered Guidance
items.description: Janus Henderson Investors, an investment management company, released its “Janus Henderson Forty Fund” second-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The fund returned 19.34% in the second quarter, compared to the Russell 1000 Growth Index’s 17.84% return. items.title: Analyst Favors Cigna, Alignment Healthcare, Cautious On Peers
items.description: Cigna's Evernorth invests $3.5 billion in Shields Health Solutions as Sycamore acquires the firm, while BofA highlights Cigna's strong growth outlook.
